Ranveer Singh gifted Rs 5 crore car after 'Dhurandhar' success
description: Ranveer Singh arrived at the airport in a new GMC Hummer, following the massive success of 'Dhurandhar' and 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge'. The films have collectively earned over Rs 2,400 crore. Singh also delighted fans with a heartwarming cake-cutting interaction, further cementing his popularity.

title: 'Ladies of the house … ': Yograj Singh's shocking remark blames wives for player retirements
description: Yograj Singh believes wives often influence players' retirement decisions, urging women to stay out of such matters. He also criticized Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma for retiring from T20Is and Tests, while surprisingly praising MS Dhoni's continued fitness and dedication, stating no one should tell him to retire.

‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ collection: Movie surpasses Rs 1,100 cr worldwide
description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has shattered box office records, achieving a staggering Rs 1100 crore worldwide. The spy thriller garnered a massive opening, surpassing Rs 800 crore gross in India within nine days. Despite a slight weekday dip, the film's impressive performance continues to captivate audiences, with expectations of a weekend surge.

Bengaluru professor held for grabbing girl’s hand, trespass
description: A university faculty member is under scrutiny after reportedly making an inappropriate marriage proposal to a student during a lecture, causing significant unrest among the student body. Abdul Rehman Sharif faces serious allegations, including assault, sexual harassment, and criminal trespass, after seemingly ignoring directives to maintain distance and allegedly touching the student's hand without consent.

title: Indore penthouse row: 18-year-old was driving for past one year without licence
description: An 18-year-old, who recently turned of age, allegedly drove without a license for years before fatally striking a woman engineer. He and his father are in police remand as investigators reconstruct the incident, focusing on technical and eyewitness evidence. The accused reportedly assaulted residents before ramming his car into a crowd.

description: Former cricketer Yograj Singh has ignited a debate on player longevity, criticizing Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma for contemplating retirement. He believes performance should dictate selection, not age.  Interestingly, Singh lauded MS Dhoni's continued fitness and dedication, strongly opposing calls for his retirement and advocating for his extended playing career.

Birthday party spirals into brawl over DJ song at Faridabad club
description: A birthday party in Faridabad turned violent when a dispute over music led to a group of youths assaulting a man, his daughters, and their friends. The complainant reported being attacked and robbed of valuables after intervening to protect his children. Police have registered an FIR and are examining CCTV footage.

title: 'Will never go nuclear, India can help end this war': Iran envoy
description: “Our supreme leader issued a fatwa. He said nuclear weapons are forbidden, haraam. So, we don't have it. We don't want to have it. We are not looking for it,” said Ilahi. Ending the war in West Asia depends on countries that started it, he said. He dismissed Pakistan’s claim that it was mediating between Iran and the US.

title: Govt slashes excise duty on petrol, diesel to shield consumers, oil companies
description: The windfall tax will also help the Centre partly offset the impact of the excise duty cut. Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs chairman Vivek Chaturvedi said the windfall tax on exports will result in a gain of about Rs 1,500 crore in the first fortnight while the govt will have to forgo over Rs 7,000 crore in revenue because of the excise duty cut. He said the export tax will be reviewed fortnightly.

title: At Rs 999, LPG in Adilabad 2nd priciest in country
description: Adilabad district in Telangana faces the highest LPG prices in South India at Rs 999 per cylinder, significantly impacting household budgets. This surge, attributed to local taxes and steep transportation costs, highlights a growing urban-rural divide in fuel affordability.  Across southern India, prices remain lower, with variations influenced by geography and logistics, creating sustained financial strain for consumers.

title: Elon Musk joined Trump's call with PM Modi on Iran war earlier this week: Report
description: The conversation focused on the evolving situation in West Asia, with both leaders emphasising the importance of keeping the Strait of Hormuz open, secure and accessible. The key maritime corridor handles a significant share of global oil shipments and remains critical to international energy markets. However, it remains unclear why Musk was included in the call or whether he spoke.

Shark Tank judge Anupam Mittal to companies: Stop saying Bharat doesn’t pay
description: Shark Tank judge Anupam Mittal refutes the notion that 'Bharat doesn't pay,' asserting that Indian consumers readily pay for genuine value. Drawing from his experiences with companies like People Group and Mauj, Mittal highlights Primetrace, an AI startup, as an example of successful monetization in the Indian market, achieving a significant EBITDA run-rate.
